children.heading: .—Authority of director
children.label: 1 .—Authority of director
children.text: The Director may, in the Director’s discretion, place in a retired status any participant in the system described in paragraph (2).

children.label: A
children.text: has completed at least 25 years of service; or

children.label: B
children.text: is at least 50 years of age and has completed at least 20 years of service.

children.label: A
children.text: upon reaching age 65, in the case of a participant in the system who is at the Senior Intelligence Service rank of level 4 or above; and

children.label: B
children.text: upon reaching age 60, in the case of any other participant in the system.

children.heading: Effective date of retirement
children.label: 2 Effective date of retirement
children.text: Retirement under paragraph (1) shall be effective on the last day of the month in which the participant reaches the age applicable to that participant under that paragraph.

children.heading: Authority for extension
children.label: 3 Authority for extension
children.text: In any case in which the Director determines it to be in the public interest, the Director may extend the mandatory retirement date for a participant under this subsection by a period of not to exceed 5 years.

children.heading: Retirement benefits
children.label: c Retirement benefits
children.text: A participant retired under this section shall receive retirement benefits in accordance with .section 2031 of this title
